name: Possible SID History Injection - High-Privilege SID with Same Domain
description: A high-privilege Microsoft Security Identifier (SID) with the same domain as the current SID was found in the history of an Active Directory object, indicating a possible SID history injection attack. (This model can be triggered only if Active Directory Connector is installed on the Domain Controller.)

rules.name: Possible SID History Injection - High-Privilege SID with Same Domain

author: Johnny Tu
